top_signals.title: Copper Falls to Three-Week Low on Flareup in US-Iran Fighting
top_signals.summary: Copper fell to a three-week low as fresh fighting in the Middle East raised concern around faster inflation, higher interest rates and slower economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil jumps as U.S. strikes in Iran raise worries of extended disruption to energy flows
top_signals.summary: Oil prices jumped on Thursday after the United States launched a fresh round of military strikes against targets in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Strikes Iran in Escalation Over Stalled Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: The US military launched strikes against "multiple" targets in Iran for the second straight day after President Donald Trump accused the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
top_signals.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if 'perps' trading is any guide
top_signals.summary: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual future on Hyperliquid at $162, about 20% above the company's fixed IPO share price of $135.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Here’s that ‘SpaceX’s IPO is overvalued by 114%’ research in full

top_signals.title: Mark Kleinman: BP might do well to plug credibility gap with Soames
top_signals.summary: Mark Kleinman is Sky News’ City Editor and the man who gets the Square Mile talking in his City AM column BP might do well to plug credibility gap with Soames Now that the dust has begun to settle on Albert Manifold’s ousting as BP chairman, the mutual recriminations between the company and its erstwhile leader have begun [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
